gnomad.note: absent or extremely rare in population databases

insilico.note: approximate; clinical evidence remains insufficient for pathogenic classification

mavedb_function.note: BRCA1 BRCT-domain saturation genome editing; approximate functional score

literature.title: Accurate classification of BRCA1 variants with saturation genome editing.
literature.abstract: Findlay et al. generated functional measurements across BRCA1 BRCT-domain variants, including missense changes near codon 1699.

literature.title: Clinical classification of BRCA1 and BRCA2 DNA sequence variants.
literature.abstract: Multifactorial classification frameworks highlight the need for segregation, tumor, and functional evidence before upgrading rare BRCA1 missense variants.
